package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_split_two_index_zero_cut: `bytes.Split(...)[0]` when only the first segment is needed.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario459Negative(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return func() bool { _, _, ok := bytes.Cut(haystack, needle); return ok }()
}
